subcodes.first_line: Friends, the time is coming when I shall be no longer with you. I have done all that could be done. I have served the Cause of Baha’u’llah to the utmost of my ability
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احباء وقتى میاید که از بین مفارقت میکنم آنچه باید بکنم کرده ام تا اندازه ای که
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @love and unity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
